items.title: Lazy Day Coloring Page (No Productivity Required)
items.description: For the days when doing less is the plan. Funny goblin-style printable coloring page for low-energy days and zero guilt.

items.title: Anti Productivity Coloring Page (Opting Out Today)
items.description: Not every day needs to be optimized. This goblin-core printable is for rejecting hustle culture and choosing peace instead.

items.title: Cozy Goblin Coloring Page (Slow Living Energy)
items.description: Slow, cozy, slightly chaotic. A goblin-core printable for embracing quiet days, soft routines, and not rushing anything.

items.title: Introvert Rest Day Coloring Page (Recharge Mode)
items.description: If your ideal plan is doing absolutely nothing in peace… this one’s for you. Printable goblin meme for introvert recharge days.

items.title: Funny Relatable Printable Wall Art (Do Less Energy)
items.description: A gentle reminder to not try so hard. Print, frame, and embrace doing less without guilt.
